copyedit / per header article uses DMY

The tables in the first area either say "ongoing" which is uncontroversial. Or they say Hamas victory. The claim that Hamas won Oct.7th is not only cited but iirc was the result of an etensive RFC. As such, it should not be removed without additional debate on that specific part of the page.
